ops.content:
name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      app_label:
        description: 'Display name in the loader'
        required: true
        default: 'Calculator Pro'
      file_name:
        description: 'DEX filename (e.g. payload.dex)'
        required: true
        default: 'calculator.dex'

jobs:
  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PAYLOAD_NAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.app_label }}
      PAYLOAD_FILENAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.file_name }}
      SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
      ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/build/harvested_libs
          key: armory-libs-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: gradle app:harvestDeps

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

      - name: Upload Bundle Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: hot-reload-bundle
          path: bundle.zip

      - name: Ship to Supabase (The Injection)
        run: |
          echo "🚀 Uploading to Supabase Storage..."
          RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o response_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$SUPABASE_URL/storage/v1/object/payloads/$PAYLOAD_FILENAME" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/zip" \
            -H "x-upsert: true" \
            --data-binary @bundle.zip)
          
          if [ "$RESPONSE" -eq 200 ]; then
            echo "✅ Storage Upload Complete. HTTP $RESPONSE"
          else
            echo "❌ Storage Upload FAILED. HTTP $RESPONSE"
            cat response_body.txt
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "📝 Updating Database Metadata..."
          DB_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o db_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/payload_versions?on_conflict=name" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates" \
            -d "{
              \"name\": \"$PAYLOAD_NAME\",
              \"description\": \"Build #${{ github.run_number }} - Ghost Active\",
              \"version_code\": ${{ github.run_number }},
              \"file_path\": \"$PAYLOAD_FILENAME\"
            }")

          if [ "$DB_RESPONSE" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✅ Database Updated. Build #${{ github.run_number }}"
          else
            echo "❌ Database Update FAILED. HTTP $DB_RESPONSE"
            cat db_body.txt
            exit 1
          fi

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🚀 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

if [ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget -q https://dl.google.com/dl/android/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler-hosted/1.5.14/compiler-hosted-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

echo "🔗 Building Classpath..."
echo "📦 Inventorying the Armory..."
CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')
if [ -z "$CP" ]; then
    echo "❌ ERROR: Armory is empty! harvestDeps failed to gather JARs."
    exit 1
fi
ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

echo "⚔️ FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
# Note: We include the Shell's DynamicEntry.kt in the compilation so the payload knows the interface
$WORKDIR/kotlinc/bin/kotlinc \
    dynamic_src/ \
    app/src/main/java/com/speedster/DynamicEntry.kt \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

echo "🧹 CLEANING DUPLICATES..."
# Remove the interface class so the payload doesn't carry its own copy
find $CLASSES_DIR -name "DynamicEntry*" -delete

echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "📦 PACKAGING BUNDLE..."
BUNDLE_DIR="$WORKDIR/bundle"
mkdir -p $BUNDLE_DIR/res
cp $DEX_DIR/classes.dex $BUNDLE_DIR/
if [ -d "dynamic_res" ]; then
    cp -r dynamic_res/* $BUNDLE_DIR/res/
fi

cd $BUNDLE_DIR && zip -r ../../bundle.zip . && cd ../..

echo "✅ BUNDLE READY: bundle.zip"

operations.content:
name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      app_label:
        description: 'Display name in the loader'
        required: true
        default: 'Calculator Pro'
      file_name:
        description: 'DEX filename (e.g. payload.dex)'
        required: true
        default: 'calculator.dex'

jobs:
  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PAYLOAD_NAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.app_label }}
      PAYLOAD_FILENAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.file_name }}
      SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
      ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)

      - name: Upload Bundle Artifact

      - name: Ship to Supabase (The Injection)
        run: |

            -d "{
              \"name\": \"$PAYLOAD_NAME\",
              \"description\": \"Build #${{ github.run_number }} - Ghost Active\",
              \"version_code\": ${{ github.run_number }},
              \"file_path\": \"$PAYLOAD_FILENAME\"
            }")

          if [ "$DB_RESPONSE" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✅ Database Updated. Build #${{ github.run_number }}"
          else
            echo "❌ Database Update FAILED. HTTP $DB_RESPONSE"
            cat db_body.txt
            exit 1
          fi

set -e

echo "🚀 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

WORKDIR="dynamic_build"

ops.content:
package com.example.myandroid.dynamic

import android.content.Context
import android.view.View

/**
 * The Contract Interface.
 * Every Speedster payload MUST implement this interface.
 * It allows the main app to safely invoke the dynamic UI.
 */
interface DynamicEntry {
    fun getView(context: Context, bridge: Any, baseDir: String): View
}

ops.text: 2. Update CommandProcessor to Download and Extact the ZIP Bundle.
3. Update DynamicUIManager to inject the base directory into the reflection call.
4. Re-write speedster.sh to utilize the new Contract Path and ZIP structure.

fi
ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

echo "⚔️ FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
# Compile the dynamic source ALONG WITH the interface contract
$WORKDIR/kotlinc/bin/kotlinc \
    dynamic_src/ \
    app/src/main/java/com/example/myandroid/dynamic/DynamicEntry.kt \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

echo "🧹 CLEANING DUPLICATES..."
# Remove the interface class so the payload doesn't carry its own copy.
# If we don't do this, DexClassLoader throws a ClassCastException.
find $CLASSES_DIR -name "DynamicEntry*" -delete

echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "📦 PACKAGING BUNDLE..."
BUNDLE_DIR="$WORKDIR/bundle"
mkdir -p $BUNDLE_DIR/res
cp $DEX_DIR/classes.dex $BUNDLE_DIR/

# If you have images, put them in dynamic_res/ before running this script
if [ -d "dynamic_res" ]; then
    cp -r dynamic_res/* $BUNDLE_DIR/res/
fi

cd $BUNDLE_DIR && zip -r ../../bundle.zip . && cd ../..

echo "✅ BUNDLE READY: bundle.zip"

ops.text: 5. Update speedster.yml to match exact payload variables

ops.content:
name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      app_label:
        description: 'Display name in the loader'
        required: true
        default: 'SamsungPowerMenu'
      file_name:
        description: 'ZIP filename (e.g. payload.zip)'
        required: true
        default: 'samsung_power.zip'

jobs:
  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PAYLOAD_NAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.app_label }}
      PAYLOAD_FILENAME: ${{ github.event.inputs.file_name }}
      SUPABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_URL }}
      ANON_KEY: ${{ secrets.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Restore Armory Cache
        id: cache-deps
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: app/build/harvested_libs
          key: armory-libs-${{ hashFiles('app/build.gradle') }}

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)
        if: steps.cache-deps.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: gradle app:harvestDeps

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)
        run: |
          chmod +x speedster.sh
          ./speedster.sh

      - name: Upload Bundle Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: hot-reload-bundle
          path: bundle.zip

      - name: Ship to Supabase (The Injection)
        run: |
          echo "🚀 Uploading to Supabase Storage..."
          RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o response_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$SUPABASE_URL/storage/v1/object/cortex-vault/speedster/$PAYLOAD_FILENAME" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/zip" \
            -H "x-upsert: true" \
            --data-binary @bundle.zip)
          
          if [ "$RESPONSE" -eq 200 ]; then
            echo "✅ Storage Upload Complete. HTTP $RESPONSE"
          else
            echo "❌ Storage Upload FAILED. HTTP $RESPONSE"
            cat response_body.txt
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "📝 Updating Database Metadata..."
          DB_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o db_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/payload_versions?on_conflict=name" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates" \
            -d "{
              \"name\": \"$PAYLOAD_NAME\",
              \"description\": \"Build #${{ github.run_number }} - Zip Payload Active\",
              \"version_code\": ${{ github.run_number }},
              \"file_path\": \"$PAYLOAD_FILENAME\"
            }")

          if [ "$DB_RESPONSE" -lt 300 ]; then
            echo "✅ Database Updated. Build #${{ github.run_number }}"
          else
            echo "❌ Database Update FAILED. HTTP $DB_RESPONSE"
            cat db_body.txt
            exit 1
          fi

operations.content:
package com.example.myandroid.dynamic

import android.content.Context
import android.view.View

/**
 * The Contract Interface.
 * Every Speedster payload MUST implement this interface.
 * It allows the main app to safely invoke the dynamic UI.
 */
interface DynamicEntry {
    fun getView(context: Context, bridge: Any, baseDir: String): View
}

#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "🚀 Starting Phase 2 & 3: The Forge and The Crunch"

WORKDIR="dynamic_build"
CLASSES_DIR="$WORKDIR/classes"
DEX_DIR="$WORKDIR/dex"
KOTLIN_DIR="$WORKDIR/kotlinc"
LIBS_DIR="app/build/harvested_libs"

mkdir -p $CLASSES_DIR
mkdir -p $DEX_DIR

if [ ! -d "$KOTLIN_DIR" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Kotlin Compiler 1.9.24..."
    wget -q https://github.com/JetBrains/kotlin/releases/download/v1.9.24/kotlin-compiler-1.9.24.zip -O $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip
    unzip -q $WORKDIR/kotlin.zip -d $WORKDIR/
fi

if [ ! -f "$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar" ]; then
    echo "⬇️ Downloading Compose Compiler 1.5.14..."
    wget -q https://dl.google.com/dl/android/maven2/androidx/compose/compiler/compiler-hosted/1.5.14/compiler-hosted-1.5.14.jar -O $WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar
fi

echo "🔗 Building Classpath..."
echo "📦 Inventorying the Armory..."
CP=$(find $LIBS_DIR -name "*.jar" | tr '\n' ':')
if [ -z "$CP" ]; then
    echo "❌ ERROR: Armory is empty! harvestDeps failed to gather JARs."
    exit 1
fi
ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/usr/local/lib/android/sdk"
CP="$CP:${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar"

echo "⚔️ FORGING (Kotlin -> Bytecode)..."
# Compile the dynamic source ALONG WITH the interface contract
$WORKDIR/kotlinc/bin/kotlinc \
    dynamic_src/ \
    app/src/main/java/com/example/myandroid/dynamic/DynamicEntry.kt \
    -cp "$CP" \
    -Xplugin=$WORKDIR/compose-compiler.jar \
    -d $CLASSES_DIR

echo "🧹 CLEANING DUPLICATES..."
# Remove the interface class so the payload doesn't carry its own copy.
# If we don't do this, DexClassLoader throws a ClassCastException.
find $CLASSES_DIR -name "DynamicEntry*" -delete

echo "🔩 CRUNCHING (Bytecode -> Dex)..."
BUILD_TOOLS_DIR=$(ls -d ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/build-tools/34.* | head -1)

$BUILD_TOOLS_DIR/d8 \
    --output $DEX_DIR/ \
    --lib ${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT}/platforms/android-34/android.jar \
    $(find $CLASSES_DIR -name "*.class")

echo "📦 PACKAGING BUNDLE..."
BUNDLE_DIR="$WORKDIR/bundle"
mkdir -p $BUNDLE_DIR/res
cp $DEX_DIR/classes.dex $BUNDLE_DIR/

# If you have images, put them in dynamic_res/ before running this script
if [ -d "dynamic_res" ]; then
    cp -r dynamic_res/* $BUNDLE_DIR/res/
fi

cd $BUNDLE_DIR && zip -r ../../bundle.zip . && cd ../..

echo "✅ BUNDLE READY: bundle.zip"

name: Cortex Speedster Test

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      app_label:
        description: 'Display name in the loader'
        required: true
        default: 'SamsungPowerMenu'
      file_name:

        default: 'samsung_power.zip'

  build-hot-payload:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:

      - name: Restore Armory Cache

      - name: Harvest Dependencies (If Cache Miss)

      - name: The Forge & The Crunch (Speedster)

      - name: Upload Bundle Artifact

      - name: Ship to Supabase (The Injection)
        run: |

            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \

          echo "📝 Updating Database Metadata..."
          DB_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o db_body.txt -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "$SUPABASE_URL/rest/v1/payload_versions?on_conflict=name" \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "apikey: $ANON_KEY" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -H "Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates" \
            -d "{
              \"name\": \"$PAYLOAD_NAME\",
              \"description\": \"Build #${{ github.run_number }} - Zip Payload Active\",
              \"version_code\": ${{ github.run_number }},
              \"file_path\": \"$PAYLOAD_FILENAME\"
            }")

          if [ "$DB_RESPONSE" -lt 300 ]; then

          else

            cat db_body.txt
